title: VolumetricSampler Object
description: The VolumetricSampler object which is used for controled sampling of the volumetric model.

methods.name: addSamplePoints
methods.description: Appends sample points to the existing sample points to be used for sampling the volumetric model.

methods.name: classType
methods.description: Static function that all classes support that returns the type of the class as a string. The returned string matches the string returned by the objectType property. For example if you have a reference to an object and you want to check if it's a SketchLine you can use myObject.objectType == fusion.SketchLine.classType().

methods.name: clearSamplePoints
methods.description: Clears the sample points that have been set for sampling the volumetric model.

methods.name: evaluate
methods.description: Evaluates the volumetric model at the previously set sample points for the given node and returns the results.

methods.name: evaluateColor
methods.description: Evaluates the color of the model at the previously set sample points and returns the results.

methods.name: evaluateDensity
methods.description: Evaluates the density of the model at the previously set sample points and returns the results. This value is what is used to determine the level set of the model.

methods.name: evaluateLevelSet
methods.description: Evaluates the level set function of the model at the previously set sample points and returns the results.

methods.name: samplePointCount
methods.description: Gets the number of sample points that will be used for sampling the volumetric model.

methods.name: setBoundingBoxSampling
methods.description: Calculates and sets the sample points to be used for sampling the volumetric model for a given resolution throughout the bounding box provided. This will override any previously set sample points.

methods.name: setPlaneSampling
methods.description: Calculates and sets the sample points to be used for sampling the volumetric model for a given resolution, plane and primary axis. The points will be distributed in a grid pattern on the plane, starting at the plane origin and extend in the primary axis and secodary axis for the axis size arguments. The secondary axis is calculated from the cross product of the plane normal and the primary axis. This will override any previously set sample points.

methods.name: setSamplePoints
methods.description: Sets sample points to be used for sampling the volumetric model.

properties.name: isValid
properties.description: Indicates if this object is still valid, i.e. hasn't been deleted or some other action done to invalidate the reference.

properties.name: objectType
properties.description: This property is supported by all objects in the API and returns a string that contains the full name (namespace::objecttype) describing the type of the object.   It's often useful to use this in combination with the classType method to see if an object is a certain type. For example: if obj.objectType == adsk.core.Point3D.classType():

addSamplePoints.title: VolumetricSampler.addSamplePoints Method
addSamplePoints.description: Appends sample points to the existing sample points to be used for sampling the volumetric model.

parameters.name: samplePoints
parameters.description: The sample points to be added to the sampler.

classType.title: VolumetricSampler.classType Method
classType.description: Static function that all classes support that returns the type of the class as a string. The returned string matches the string returned by the objectType property. For example if you have a reference to an object and you want to check if it's a SketchLine you can use myObject.objectType == fusion.SketchLine.classType().
classType.return_description: Returns a string indicating the type of the object.

clearSamplePoints.title: VolumetricSampler.clearSamplePoints Method
clearSamplePoints.description: Clears the sample points that have been set for sampling the volumetric model.
clearSamplePoints.return_description: True if the sample points were successfully cleared.

evaluate.title: VolumetricSampler.evaluate Method
evaluate.description: Evaluates the volumetric model at the previously set sample points for the given node and returns the results.

syntax.python:
# Uses no optional arguments.
returnValue = volumetricSampler_var.evaluate(graphNode)

# Uses optional arguments.
returnValue = volumetricSampler_var.evaluate(graphNode, isOutput, index)

evaluate.return_description: An array of VolumetricSample objects that contain the results of sampling the volumetric model.

parameters.name: graphNode
parameters.description: The graph node to evaluate at the sample points.

parameters.name: isOutput
parameters.description: Optional argument that controls the sampling. If set to true samples an output pin, if set to false samples an input pin. Default is True.   This is an optional argument whose default value is True.

parameters.name: index
parameters.description: Optional argument that controls the index of the pin to sample. Default is 0 which is the first pin.   This is an optional argument whose default value is 0.

evaluateColor.title: VolumetricSampler.evaluateColor Method
evaluateColor.description: Evaluates the color of the model at the previously set sample points and returns the results.
evaluateColor.return_description: An array of VolumetricColorSample objects that contain the results of sampling the volumetric model.

evaluateDensity.title: VolumetricSampler.evaluateDensity Method
evaluateDensity.description: Evaluates the density of the model at the previously set sample points and returns the results. This value is what is used to determine the level set of the model.
evaluateDensity.return_description: An array of VolumetricScalarSample objects that contain the results of sampling the volumetric model.

evaluateLevelSet.title: VolumetricSampler.evaluateLevelSet Method
evaluateLevelSet.description: Evaluates the level set function of the model at the previously set sample points and returns the results.
evaluateLevelSet.return_description: An array of VolumetricScalarSample objectst that contain the results of sampling the volumetric model.

samplePointCount.title: VolumetricSampler.samplePointCount Method
samplePointCount.description: Gets the number of sample points that will be used for sampling the volumetric model.
samplePointCount.return_description: The number of sample points that will be used for sampling the volumetric model.

setBoundingBoxSampling.title: VolumetricSampler.setBoundingBoxSampling Method
setBoundingBoxSampling.description: Calculates and sets the sample points to be used for sampling the volumetric model for a given resolution throughout the bounding box provided. This will override any previously set sample points.
setBoundingBoxSampling.return_description: True if the sample points were set successfully.

parameters.name: elementSize
parameters.description: The approximate spacing between sample points. The units used for the element size are centimeters.

parameters.name: boundingBox3d
parameters.description: The bounding box in which the sample points will be distributed.

setPlaneSampling.title: VolumetricSampler.setPlaneSampling Method
setPlaneSampling.description: Calculates and sets the sample points to be used for sampling the volumetric model for a given resolution, plane and primary axis. The points will be distributed in a grid pattern on the plane, starting at the plane origin and extend in the primary axis and secodary axis for the axis size arguments. The secondary axis is calculated from the cross product of the plane normal and the primary axis. This will override any previously set sample points.
setPlaneSampling.return_description: True if the sample points were set successfully.

parameters.name: elementSize
parameters.description: The approximate spacing between sample points. The units used for the element size are centimeters.

parameters.name: plane
parameters.description: The plane on which the points will be distributed.

parameters.name: primaryAxis
parameters.description: The primary axis of the plane. This vector should be on the plane. The secondary axis of the plane is calculated as the cross-product of the plane normal and the primary axis

parameters.name: primaryAxisSize
parameters.description: The size of the plane in the primary axis direction.

parameters.name: secondaryAxisSize
parameters.description: The size of the plane in the secondary axis direction.

setSamplePoints.title: VolumetricSampler.setSamplePoints Method
setSamplePoints.description: Sets sample points to be used for sampling the volumetric model.
setSamplePoints.return_description: True if the sample points were set successfully.

parameters.name: samplePoints
parameters.description: The sample points to be used for sampling the volumetric model.

isValid.title: VolumetricSampler.isValid Property
isValid.description: Indicates if this object is still valid, i.e. hasn't been deleted or some other action done to invalidate the reference.

syntax.python:
# Get the value of the property.
propertyValue = volumetricSampler_var.isValid

objectType.title: VolumetricSampler.objectType Property
objectType.description: This property is supported by all objects in the API and returns a string that contains the full name (namespace::objecttype) describing the type of the object. It's often useful to use this in combination with the classType method to see if an object is a certain type. For example: if obj.objectType == adsk.core.Point3D.classType():

syntax.python:
# Get the value of the property.
propertyValue = volumetricSampler_var.objectType
